content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates strong, timely reads throughout. In turn 4, after the client says 'fine,' the coach immediately moves to the body — reading that the verbal report and the lived experience may not be aligned. In turn 6, the coach explicitly names a somatic observation ('I notice you looked away for a second there') — this is textbook read-precedes-question, naming the shown vs. the said. The coach avoids all the traps: doesn't argue the fearlessness, doesn't validate it, doesn't diagnose dissociation, doesn't teach. By turns 10-12, the coach is reading the flatness landscape and probing both directions (failure/success) to let the client notice the sameness — which is exactly the numbness-layer surfacing. Turn 14 ('Stay with that for a second') is a precise read of the moment the client first contacts the flatness ('Huh') and holds them there rather than moving past. The reads are specific, somatic, and operative at the moments they change the conversation.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opening question, no read yet but appropriately doesn't engage the content frame."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Moves to body immediately after 'fine' — implicit read that the verbal report isn't the whole signal."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit somatic read named in real time: 'I notice you looked away.' Read precedes question. Distinguishes shown from said."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Reflects the incongruence but stays in content territory rather than naming a somatic/energetic read."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Probes the flatness layer by asking about failure — reading that the client's affect is uniformly flat regardless of stakes."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tests the other direction (success) — reading that both poles will land flat, which surfaces the numbness layer for the client."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the exact moment of contact ('Huh') and holds the client there — precise timing on a felt-sense read."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "the-happiness-filter"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "two-words-for-fear"],
  "notes": "The coach never names dissociation as diagnosis (good), and the reads stay at the level of observation rather than interpretation. Reads are sparse but consistently timely and operative."
}
